folder_layout: Output claims.jsonl at run root; all inputs, paperwork, scripts, and intermediates under _supporting/.
post_run_corrections: 2026-06-07: re-validated under hardened validate_claims.py. Fixed 41 records whose comparison object used a non-schema {comparator,direction,value} shape (now {dimension,baseline,comparator,direction}); fixed 38 records with off-vocab markdown_quality_flags (dropped numeric_dense_text and text_cutoff; mapped broken_word_artifact->broken_words). Output hash updated accordingly.
notes: Smoke test covering 3 of 25 source files (Agriculture, Health, Trade). The 22 warnings are all expected coverage warnings for the 22 unextracted files in this scope. Full run will follow if adversarial review passes.
